summary: Complete frontend testing of /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace article page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 23+ features verified and passing. Page implements the 8-section spec with Hero, 2-Column Layout, Article Content (TOC/FAQ/Decision Matrix/Scenarios), Sticky Sidebar (3 widgets), Related Services, Minimal Footer, Floating + Mobile CTAs, and SEO with Article+FAQPage+BreadcrumbList schemas.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Article page /blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace fully tested with Precision Craft design system. All features verified: (1) Hero with breadcrumb Home → Blog → Expert Advice, category pill Expert Advice, date January 15 2025, 6 min read. (2) H1: Repair vs Replace: When to Fix Your Appliance — Bay Area Expert Guide. (3) 2-column layout 65.6%/30.9% (748px/352px). (4) TOC with 8 anchor links (#fifty-percent-rule, #appliance-age, #energy-efficiency, #repair-frequency, #warranty, #decision-matrix, #real-examples, #faq). (5) 50% Rule section with navy box (#0D1B2A) and orange border-left (#FF5722), verdict checkmarks. (6) Lifespan grid with 6 appliance cards (Refrigerators, Washers, Dryers, Dishwashers, Ovens & Ranges, Microwaves) - years in #FF5722 orange. (7) Mid-article CTA with orange #FF5722 background after Energy Efficiency. (8) Decision Matrix 2-column: REPAIR IF (orange border/icon) vs REPLACE IF (navy border/icon). (9) Real-World Examples: Scenario 1 Samsung Washer (REPAIR orange) + Scenario 2 GE Refrigerator (REPLACE navy). (10) FAQ section 5 questions accordion style, chevron rotates 180deg on expand. (11) Bottom CTA: FREE EXPERT ADVICE eyebrow, navy #0D1B2A background. (12) Author box: avatar A, Andrei - Licensed Appliance Technician, License #51001. (13) Sticky sidebar top:80px with 3 widgets: HONEST ASSESSMENT (Call/Book buttons), Quick Decision Guide (REPAIR if/REPLACE if lists), Related Articles (4 links). (14) Related Services: 3 cards (2 SERVICE + 1 ARTICLE). (15) Minimal footer: logo, phone (760) 543-5733, copyright 2026 FixitBay LLC. (16) Floating BOOK REPAIR button on desktop after 300px scroll. (17) Mobile sticky bar with CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US buttons. (18) SEO: title, meta description, canonical https://fixitbay.net/blog/when-to-repair-vs-replace, Article/FAQPage/BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schemas. Uses custom SEOMetaTags + useSchemas hook (NOT react-helmet-async).
